text: A rose speaks of love silently, in a language known only to the heart.
Daisies are like sunshine to the ground.
The lily of the valley is delicate and small, yet its fragrance is enough to fill a room.
Hydrangeas symbolize gratitude, grace, and abundance.
A sunflower's beauty lies in its ability to turn towards the light.
The cherry blossom represents the fleeting nature of life, a reminder to cherish each moment.
Orchids are proof that beauty flourishes in patience and care.
Tulips are the heralds of spring, whispering warmth after the cold.
Lavender is the scent of calmness, bringing peace to the restless soul.
The lotus flower blooms most beautifully from the deepest mud.
